Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to produce a process tree that models the described process

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to output the process tree in the textual notation as described using for sequence X for exclusive choice for parallel for loop

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The initial diagnostic test itself is an exclusive choice between CE and FBP

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The loop consists of SC then treatment choice then re diagnostic test and then repeat from SC if abnormal

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Process tree loop means execute A then either exit or do B then A again

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We could model optional loop as XOR between skipping the loop and doing the loop which then executes at least once

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus after the initial diagnostic test we have an XOR either skip loop or enter the loop

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We can define the loop as star of sequence SC then XOR TM SPT then XOR FCE FBA with tau as redo

Name: Validation - PE
Text: That exactly models repeating the whole SC treatment and re diagnostic sequence

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After the loop or skip we proceed to AI and NC in parallel then FAS then DDI then final concurrency of BL ICP and MRF

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: For three way concurrency we can nest plus operators such as plus BL with plus ICP and MRF

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The process overall can be structured as a big sequence from start to finish with internal branching nodes

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: To be safe we should stick to binary representation and chain sequence operators

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The order A then RG then IA then TI then TC then initial XOR then optional loop then parallel AI NC then FAS DDI then final parallel block matches the description

Name: Validation - PE
Text: All listed activities are accounted for in the constructed tree

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Thus the process tree is correct
